title: Cover
description: Kitchen CFO opening slide — symptom-led tagline: your bloodwork, food, and energy.

title: The Problem
description: Leads with fatigue, brain fog, poor sleep, and loss of focus — most people never discover the deficiencies behind them.

title: The Solution
description: Outcome-first: see what your meals are missing, turn labs into answers, wake up with more energy.

title: How It Works
description: Three steps from confused to clear — each step unlocks energy, understanding, and restful sleep.

title: The Difference
description: Side-by-side comparison: other apps vs Kitchen CFO — focused on what users feel and experience.

title: Traction
description: 4 five-star reviews, built and shipped in 1 week.

title: The Founder
description: Founder credentials: profession, company, and project context.

title: The Vision
description: B2B2C model: practitioners acquire, patients convert.

title: The Market
description: $946B digital health, $31B personalized nutrition — zero apps bridging bloodwork to meals.

title: The Ask
description: Beta practitioners sought; founder personal quote added as honest human moment below the app URL.
